arts.ttl: Man Utd could replace Erik ten Hag signing who has played just TWO games
arts.sum: Manchester United appear to be interesting in signing another goalkeeper to provide competition for Andre Onana and to push the former Ajax star as the club's second choice option

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood and Paul Pogba Man United thoughts clear in Jadon Sancho message
arts.sum: The former Manchester United forward was quick to praise the Chelsea winger after yet another impressive performance at his new club

arts.ttl: Why Amad has been benched for Manchester United vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Man Utd play Tottenham in the Premier League on Sunday and Erik ten Hag spoke ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester United 25-26 Away Kit to Have Never-Used-Before Colors
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively leak that Manchester United FC's new 2025-2026 away strip will feature a very interesting colorway that has never been used before.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Son Heung-min injury admission after Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur faced Manchester United at Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon, with Ange Postecoglou's men forced to go without their injured captain, Son Heung-min

arts.ttl: Manchester United name XI to face Spurs at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has named his Manchester United team to face Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League. Marcus Rashford returns to the starting side after being dropped to the bench for the goalless draw at Crystal Palace last weekend, in a decision that was criticised following the stalemate at Selhurst Park. arts.ttl: Injury blow sees Harry Maguire miss Man United's clash with Tottenham after he picked up a knock in training
arts.sum: The 31-year-old defender had featured in seven of United's first eight games of the season in all competitions. However, Maguire suffered a knock in training and was therefore unavailable.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho sends Cole Palmer three-word message of approval after four goal showing
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho was in action for Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday, providing an assist in the 4-2 win over Brighton, and took to social media after the game

arts.ttl: Son ruled out as Spurs name XI for Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have named their starting team for Sunday’s clash at Manchester United with Son Heung-min ruled out. Son was substituted during the 3-0 win over Qarabag in the Europa League on Thursday and has lost his race to feature at Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Man Utd set to target ANOTHER Dutch transfer
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is considering a move for another player from the Netherlands, with Manchester United reportedly challenging Bayern Munich to sign a breakout wonderkid of a Dutch legend. And his next target could be Ruben van Bommel, the son of World Cup runner up Mark who has become a regular at left wing for Eredivisie outfit AZ Alkmaar .
